name: KitchenOwl
description: A grocery list and recipe manager
compose:
name: slashnode-kitchenowl
services:
  web:
    image: tombursch/kitchenowl:v0.7.9
    container_name: kitchenowl-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      JWT_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      DB_DRIVER: postgresql
      DB_HOST: kitchenowl-db
      DB_NAME: kitchenowl
      DB_USER: kitchenowl
      DB_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - web_data-kitchenowl_files:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8474:8080
  db:
    image: postgres:17.4
    container_name: kitchenowl-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: kitchenowl
      POSTGRES_USER: kitchenowl
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - db_data-kitchenowl_db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-kitchenowl_files:
    name: slashnode-kitchenowl_web_data-kitchenowl_files
  db_data-kitchenowl_db:
    name: slashnode-kitchenowl_db_data-kitchenowl_db
